parsed.availability_comment: Minor preseason injury risk only; expected available from the start unless a late setback emerges.
parsed.availability_note: January 2026 rib fracture was reported, but prognosis pointed to IPL availability; no later adverse report found before GT's March 31, 2026 opener.
parsed.followup_reason: No current adverse update after the January 2, 2026 rib-fracture reports; status is fit/available by latest available evidence.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Selection pressure is tactical only, not overseas-slot driven.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot cap does not apply. Opening-batter place is secure on squad context.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained GT top-order mainstay and established opening batter; no credible indication he drops out when fit.
